news.title:
Blue Star MD warns Iran war may impact summer sales due to rising fuel costs.
Weakening rupee adds to concerns raised by Blue Star MD amid geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Blue Star MD warns Iran war may impact summer sales due to rising fuel costs.
Weakening rupee adds to concerns raised by Blue Star MD amid geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.

news.title: Morgan Stanley projects a 5-7.5% YoY decline for Blue Star's RAC industry in FY26.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley projects a 5-7.5% YoY decline for Blue Star's RAC industry in FY26.

news.title:
Heatwave drives shares of Blue Star, Voltas, Havells up 5% as AC demand rises.
Blue Star launched 125 AC models, including energy-efficient and antivirus tech ACs.
news.summary:
Heatwave drives shares of Blue Star, Voltas, Havells up 5% as AC demand rises.

news.title:
Blue Star MD predicts rising cooling demand, with 150M households affording air conditioners soon.
This growth enables Blue Star to expand in residential and commercial markets.
news.summary:
Blue Star MD predicts rising cooling demand, with 150M households affording air conditioners soon.
This growth enables Blue Star to expand in residential and commercial markets.

news.title:
Blue Star and Voltas focus on data center cooling, eyeing 2 GW capacity by 2026.
They are developing chillers and cooling units to meet rising demand in India.
news.summary:

news.title:
Blue Star MD B Thiagarajan announces 10-15% AC price hike this quarter.
The hike is due to commodity costs, energy labels, and currency pressures.
news.summary:
Blue Star MD B Thiagarajan announces 10-15% AC price hike this quarter.
The hike is due to commodity costs, energy labels, and currency pressures.

news.title:
Blue Star reported a data breach on Jan 31, engaged cybersecurity experts for impact assessment.
Q3 FY26 net profit fell 39% YoY to ₹80.6 cr due to a ₹56.4 cr exceptional charge.
news.summary:
Blue Star reported a data breach on Jan 31, engaged cybersecurity experts for impact assessment.
Q3 FY26 net profit fell 39% YoY to ₹80.6 cr due to a ₹56.4 cr exceptional charge.

news.title:
BSE and Groww shares fell 5-10% due to STT hike; Jefferies expects a 5% turnover drop and 4% earnings decline for both.
IDBI divestment in stage three, MOIL forms JV for manganese mining, Hero MotoCorp sales up 26% YoY, Blue Star faces cybersecurity issue.
news.summary:
BSE and Groww shares fell 5-10% due to STT hike; Jefferies expects a 5% turnover drop and 4% earnings decline for both.
IDBI divestment in stage three, MOIL forms JV for manganese mining, Hero MotoCorp sales up 26% YoY, Blue Star faces cybersecurity issue.

Standalone and consolidated unaudited financials are available on the website.

news.title:
Blue Star Ltd reports strong enquiry momentum in Electro Mechanical projects and commercial AC.
Robust order inflows noted, with some revenue shifted to the next quarter; US and Europe expansion continues.

news.title:
Blue Star Ltd released its Q3 and 9MFY26 Investor Presentation, highlighting business updates and financial performance.
Segment highlights include strong order inflows in air conditioning, subdued refrigeration demand, and steady industrial solutions growth.
news.summary:

news.title:
Blue Star's Q3 FY26 profit fell 39.2% YoY to Rs 80.55 cr, while revenue rose 4.2% to Rs 2,925.31 cr.
Unitary products saw a minor 0.8% dip; electro-mechanical projects grew 8.6%. Q4FY26 is expected to show strong growth.
news.summary:
Blue Star's Q3 FY26 profit fell 39.2% YoY to Rs 80.55 cr, while revenue rose 4.2% to Rs 2,925.31 cr.
Unitary products saw a minor 0.8% dip; electro-mechanical projects grew 8.6%. Q4FY26 is expected to show strong growth.

news.title:
Bluestar reports Q3 net profit of ₹80.5 Cr, revenue at ₹2,925 Cr.
EBITDA stands at ₹220.8 Cr with a margin of 7.5%.
news.summary:
Bluestar reports Q3 net profit of ₹80.5 Cr, revenue at ₹2,925 Cr.

news.title:
Blue Star reports Q3 PBT of ₹1.65B, down from ₹1.67B YoY.
The company noted an exceptional item of ₹564M in Q3 results.
news.summary:
